summary: Defined a typed Narada proper MCP architect role-policy projection contract derived from the MCP surface registry. The contract keeps config.json as reconciled Site-local runtime posture, separates canonical tools from optional aliases/refused tools, and validates missing, stale, alias, and refused entries.
residuals: The reconciler that reads/writes local config.json remains for task 1510.

packages/narada-proper-mcp/test/narada-proper-mcp.test.ts already contains unrelated pre-existing dirty changes; this task only owns the role-policy projection tests and removal of the config.json-dependent guard.
